title: Crimson Desert dev apologizes for use of AI art
summary: Crimson Desert developer acknowledged using AI-generated assets in the final release and apologized for the omission, stating the assets were intended to be replaced before launch. The company is conducting a comprehensive audit to identify and remove all AI content while pledging greater transparency about AI use in development.
content:
That’s some sloppy looking slop. | Image: Rex_Spy / Reddit	

Reviews of Crimson Desert have been mixed, but the bigger issue for the game has been the discovery of what appeared to be AI-generated assets in the final release. Now the developer has acknowledged that AI art was indeed used during the game's creation, but says that it was intended to be replaced before release.  In a statement on X, the company said it was conducting a "comprehensive audit" to identify and replace any AI-generated content. 
The company apologized for both its inclusion in the final release and for not being more transparent about its use during development. "We should have clearly disclosed our use of AI," it said.
The …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 绯红沙漠开发者为使用AI艺术道歉
zh.summary: 绯红沙漠开发者承认在最终版本中使用了AI生成的资产并为此道歉，声称这些资产原计划在发布前被替换。该公司正在进行全面审计以识别并移除所有AI内容，同时承诺在开发中更加透明地使用AI。

fr.title: Le développeur de Crimson Desert s'excuse pour l'utilisation d'art IA
fr.summary: Le développeur de Crimson Desert a reconnu l'utilisation d'actifs générés par IA dans la version finale et s'est excusé pour cette omission, affirmant que les actifs étaient destinés à être remplacés avant le lancement. L'entreprise procède à un audit complet pour identifier et supprimer tout contenu IA tout en s'engageant à être plus transparent concernant l'utilisation de l'IA dans le développement.

de.title: Crimson Desert-Entwickler entschuldigt sich für die Verwendung von KI-Kunst
de.summary: Der Entwickler von Crimson Desert bestätigte die Verwendung von KI-generierten Assets in der endgültigen Version und entschuldigte sich für die Auslassung, wobei er erklärte, dass die Assets vor dem Start ersetzt werden sollten. Das Unternehmen führt eine umfassende Überprüfung durch, um alle KI-Inhalte zu identifizieren und zu entfernen, und verpflichtet sich zu mehr Transparenz bei der KI-Nutzung in der Entwicklung.

es.title: El desarrollador de Crimson Desert se disculpa por el uso de arte de IA
es.summary: El desarrollador de Crimson Desert reconoció el uso de activos generados por IA en la versión final y se disculpó por la omisión, afirmando que los activos estaban destinados a ser reemplazados antes del lanzamiento. La empresa está realizando una auditoría integral para identificar y eliminar todo contenido de IA mientras se compromete a ser más transparente sobre el uso de IA en el desarrollo.

title: The best early deals you can already grab from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
summary: Amazon's Big Spring Sale (March 25-31) offers significant discounts on smart speakers and home devices, with several items reaching their lowest prices since Black Friday. Multiple retailers including Best Buy and Target are matching Amazon's deals.
content:
Amazon’s Prime Day sale may arrive earlier than usual this year, but there’s a deal event happening much sooner: Amazon’s annual Big Spring Sale, which is happening March 25th through the 31st. While it won’t be as big as Prime Day or Black Friday, it does offer you a chance to save money at a time when US tariffs have effectively increased the price of many gadgets and goods over the course of the past year.
Dozens of excellent deals — some of which we haven’t seen in months — are already starting to pop up. Some items, like Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Max, have dropped to their best price since Black Friday, while a few others, like the new Echo Dot Max and Ecovacs Deebot X8 Pro Omni, have fallen to new low prices.
You don’t need a Prime membership to take advantage of many of these deals, either. Retailers like Best Buy, Walmart, and Target are also matching Amazon’s pricing in many instances, so you can choose where you want to shop. We’ve rounded up some of the best deals we’ve spotted so far and will continue updating this post as more arrive.
Speaker deals
Echo Dot Max
The Echo Dot Max features a flat design and a redesigned sound system, which delivers nearly three times the bass as its predecessor. It also offers improved conversation detection and better noise filtering, thanks to Amazon’s new AZ3 chip. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 $74.99 at Amazon
 $99.99 $74.99 at Best Buy
 $99.99 $74.99 at Target


Sonos Move 2
With double the battery life of its predecessor and better-sounding stereo audio, the Sonos Move 2’s improvements don’t stop there. It supports line-in audio, can stream Bluetooth audio to other Sonos speakers, and more. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $499 $399 at Amazon
 $499 $399 at Best Buy
 $499 $399 at Sonos

The Amazon Echo Studio is on sale for $189.99 ($30 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target, which matches its all-time low price. Like the smallerr Echo Dot Max, the Echo Studio supports Alexa Plus and is compatible with Matte

title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
summary: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of misleading hundreds of customers by falsely convincing them their systems met privacy and security regulations. The allegations challenge the startup's core compliance verification claims.
content: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

Les allégations remettent en question les affirmations centrales de vérification de conformité de la startup.

title: Musk says he’s building Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas
summary: Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab chip fabrication plant in Austin jointly operated by Tesla and SpaceX to manufacture chips for robotics, AI, and space-based data centers. Building a chip fab requires billions in investment, years of development, and specialized expertise—challenges magnified by Musk's lack of semiconductor production background.
content:
Grok, how do you make chips? | Image: Laura Normand / The Verge	

Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies.
Musk has expressed concern, as have other executives, about the chip industry's ability to keep up with demand as the AI industry has boomed. But building a chip fabrication plant is complex, requires billions of dollars, many years, and a ton of specialized equipment. And, as Bloomberg points out, Musk "has no background in semiconductor production and a history of over-promising on g …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 马斯克称他正在德克萨斯州奥斯汀建造Terafab芯片工厂
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克宣布计划在奥斯汀建造Terafab芯片制造工厂，由特斯拉和SpaceX联合运营，用于制造机器人、人工智能和基于空间的数据中心芯片。建造芯片工厂需要数十亿美元的投资、多年的开发和专业知识——这些挑战因马斯克缺乏半导体生产背景而加重。

fr.title: Musk dit qu'il construit une usine de puces Terafab à Austin, au Texas
fr.summary: Elon Musk a annoncé son intention de construire une usine de fabrication de puces Terafab à Austin, exploitée conjointement par Tesla et SpaceX, pour fabriquer des puces pour la robotique, l'IA et les centres de données basés dans l'espace. La construction d'une usine de puces nécessite des milliards d'investissements, des années de développement et une expertise spécialisée—des défis amplifiés par le manque d'expérience de Musk en matière de production de semi-conducteurs.

de.title: Musk sagt, er baut eine Terafab-Chipfabrik in Austin, Texas
de.summary: Elon Musk kündigte Pläne an, eine Terafab-Chipfertigung in Austin zu bauen, die von Tesla und SpaceX gemeinsam betrieben wird, um Chips für Robotik, KI und weltraumgestützte Rechenzentren herzustellen. Der Bau einer Chipfabrik erfordert Milliarden an Investitionen, Jahre der Entwicklung und spezialisiertes Fachwissen—Herausforderungen, die durch Musks mangelnden Hintergrund in der Halbleiterproduktion verschärft werden.

es.title: Musk dice que está construyendo una planta de chips Terafab en Austin, Texas
es.summary: Elon Musk anunció planes para construir una planta de fabricación de chips Terafab en Austin, operada conjuntamente por Tesla y SpaceX, para fabricar chips para robótica, IA y centros de datos basados en el espacio. Construir una fábrica de chips requiere miles de millones en inversión, años de desarrollo y experiencia especializada—desafíos aumentados por la falta de experiencia de Musk en producción de semiconductores.

title: The secret story of the vocoder, the military tech that changed music forever
summary: The vocoder, invented by Bell Labs engineer Homer Dudley to simplify long-distance telephone transmission, played a crucial role in WWII secret communications before becoming a transformative force in popular music. The technology exemplifies how military innovations often find unexpected cultural impact.
content:
The vocoder was never supposed to be a revolution in music. It wasn't supposed to be anything in music, really. Its development began a century ago, when an engineer at Bell Labs was looking for a simpler way to send phone calls across copper telephone lines. The engineer, Homer Dudley, built some pretty neat technology that could both capture and synthesize the human voice.
As so much great tech does, the vocoder immediately took on a life of its own. It played a key role in World War II, enabling secret communications across the ocean. And then, only a few years later, it started to become a musical phenomenon. At first a few artists were …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 声码器的秘密故事：永远改变音乐的军事技术
zh.summary: 由贝尔实验室工程师荷马·达德利发明的声码器最初用于简化长距离电话传输，在第二次世界大战期间对秘密通信起到了关键作用，后来成为流行音乐中的一股变革力量。这项技术体现了军事创新如何经常产生意想不到的文化影响。

fr.title: L'histoire secrète du vocodeur, la technologie militaire qui a transformé la musique pour toujours
fr.summary: Le vocodeur, inventé par l'ingénieur des Bell Labs Homer Dudley pour simplifier la transmission téléphonique longue distance, a joué un rôle crucial dans les communications secrètes de la Seconde Guerre mondiale avant de devenir une force transformatrice dans la musique populaire. La technologie exemplifie comment les innovations militaires trouvent souvent un impact culturel inattendu.

de.title: Die geheime Geschichte des Vocoders, der Militärtechnologie, die die Musik für immer veränderte
de.summary: Der Vocoder, von Bell Labs-Ingenieur Homer Dudley erfunden, um die Fernsprechübertragung zu vereinfachen, spielte eine entscheidende Rolle in der geheimen Kommunikation des Zweiten Weltkriegs, bevor er zu einer transformativen Kraft in der Popmusik wurde. Die Technologie veranschaulicht, wie militärische Innovationen oft unerwartete kulturelle Auswirkungen haben.

es.title: La historia secreta del vocoder, la tecnología militar que cambió la música para siempre
es.summary: El vocoder, inventado por el ingeniero de Bell Labs Homer Dudley para simplificar la transmisión telefónica de larga distancia, jugó un papel crucial en las comunicaciones secretas de la Segunda Guerra Mundial antes de convertirse en una fuerza transformadora en la música popular. La tecnología ejemplifica cómo las innovaciones militares a menudo encuentran un impacto cultural inesperado.

title: The pint-sized Sonos Roam 2 is more than 20 percent off this weekend
summary: The Sonos Roam 2 portable speaker is available for $139 ($40 off) across Amazon, Walmart, and Sonos, nearing its lowest-ever price. The model improves upon the original with easier Bluetooth pairing, IP67 waterproofing, and up to 10 hours of battery life.
content:
Sonos is no stranger to the occasional sale. The iconic audio company routinely runs sales around Black Friday, Amazon Prime Day, and the Super Bowl, though it’s rare to see substantial discounts on its portable speakers outside of tentpole shopping events. Fortunately, if you have no interest in the Sonos Move 2 or forthcoming Sonos Play, the Sonos Roam 2 is currently available from Amazon, Walmart, and Sonos for $139 ($40 off), which is just $5 shy of its lowest price to date.
Sonos Roam 2

Where to Buy:

 $179 $139 at Amazon
 $179 $139 at Sonos
 $179 $139 at Walmart

The original Sonos Roam was by no means a bad speaker, but the quality-of-life updates on the Roam 2 are genuinely meaningful, particularly if you were the kind of person who constantly struggled to pair the first-gen model with anything via Bluetooth (guilty as charged). The latest Roam has a dedicated pairing button on the back — meaning you don’t have to hold down the power button for a set period of time just to sync it with a new phone — while still letting you tap into Sonos’ larger ecosystem of products via your home’s Wi-Fi network.
Sound quality remains unchanged, though that’s not necessarily a bad thing. The first-gen Roam was one of the best-sounding speakers in its class, with pleasantly crisp vocal performance and enough depth to satiate most folks, especially when Sonos’s automatic Trueplay room optimization tool did its job. It’s a bit of a bummer that the USB-C port remains strictly for power, and that battery life tops out at 10 hours, but I’d venture that most folks are simply going to be using it at the park or simply for an afternoon at the pool. After all, it has IP67 waterproofing, which means it can withstand up to 30 minutes in 3 feet of water.
Perhaps best of all, though, Sons claims to have made some tweaks and optimizations under the hood to ensure battery performance holds up in the long run, which was a crux of the original model. I haven’t had the Roam 2 long enough to

zh.title: Sonos Roam 2这款小型扬声器本周末降价超过20%
zh.summary: Sonos Roam 2便携式扬声器在亚马逊、沃尔玛和Sonos上以139美元（降价40美元）的价格出售，接近其有史以来的最低价。该型号在原始版本的基础上改进，提供更简单的蓝牙配对、IP67防水功能和长达10小时的电池续航时间。

fr.title: Le petit Sonos Roam 2 affiche une réduction de plus de 20% ce week-end
fr.summary: Le haut-parleur portable Sonos Roam 2 est disponible pour 139 dollars (réduction de 40 dollars) sur Amazon, Walmart et Sonos, s'approchant de son prix le plus bas jamais enregistré. Le modèle améliore l'original avec un appairage Bluetooth plus facile, une protection IP67 et jusqu'à 10 heures d'autonomie.

de.title: Der kleine Sonos Roam 2 ist dieses Wochenende um mehr als 20 Prozent reduziert
de.summary: Der tragbare Lautsprecher Sonos Roam 2 ist für 139 Dollar (40 Dollar Rabatt) auf Amazon, Walmart und Sonos erhältlich und nähert sich seinem niedrigsten Preis aller Zeiten. Das Modell verbessert das Original mit einfacherer Bluetooth-Kopplung, IP67-Wasserdichtigkeit und bis zu 10 Stunden Akkulaufzeit.

es.title: El pequeño Sonos Roam 2 tiene más del 20 por ciento de descuento este fin de semana
es.summary: El altavoz portátil Sonos Roam 2 está disponible por 139 dólares (con 40 dólares de descuento) en Amazon, Walmart y Sonos, acercándose a su precio más bajo de todos los tiempos. El modelo mejora el original con emparejamiento Bluetooth más fácil, impermeabilidad IP67 y hasta 10 horas de duración de la batería.

title: An exclusive tour of Amazon’s Trainium lab, the chip that’s won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple
summary: Amazon's custom Trainium AI chip has gained adoption from major AI companies including Anthropic, OpenAI, and Apple, validating its design. This development follows Amazon's $50 billion investment in OpenAI and highlights the strategic importance of custom silicon for AI infrastructure.
content: Shortly after Amazon  announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited me on a private tour of the chip lab at the heart of the deal.

Ce développement intervient après l'investissement de 50 milliards de dollars d'Amazon dans OpenAI et souligne l'importance stratégique du silicium personnalisé pour l'infrastructure de l'IA.

Diese Entwicklung folgt auf Amazons 50-Milliarden-Dollar-Investition in OpenAI und unterstreicht die strategische Bedeutung von maßgeschneidertem Silizium für die KI-Infrastruktur.

es.title: Un recorrido exclusivo por el laboratorio Trainium de Amazon, el chip que ganó a Anthropic, OpenAI e incluso Apple
es.summary: El chip personalizado Trainium IA de Amazon ha ganado la adopción de grandes empresas de IA, incluyendo Anthropic, OpenAI y Apple, validando su diseño. Este desarrollo sigue a la inversión de 50 mil millones de dólares de Amazon en OpenAI y destaca la importancia estratégica del silicio personalizado para la infraestructura de IA.

title: AI was everywhere at gaming’s big developer conference — except the games
summary: Despite extensive AI tool promotion at GDC—including generative AI systems for NPC creation and full game development—few actual released games showcased AI capabilities. The disconnect highlights a gap between industry enthusiasm for AI tooling and practical adoption in shipped games.
content:
AI was everywhere at the GDC Festival of Gaming this year. Vendors at the event pitched generative AI tools for things like making AI-driven NPCs and even entire games from a chat box. On the show floor, I spent 10 minutes playing a demo of a pixel-art fantasy world generated by Tencent's AI tools. In a briefing with Razer, I watched an AI assistant for QA automatically log issues in a shooter game. And there were many talks about AI, including a standing-room only presentation by Google DeepMind researchers about playable AI-generated spaces.
But there was one key place where AI was missing: the games themselves. Of the many developers I s …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI在游戏开发者大会上无处不在——除了游戏本身
zh.summary: 尽管在GDC上广泛推广AI工具,包括用于NPC创建和完整游戏开发的生成式AI系统,但发布的实际游戏很少展示AI功能。这种脱节凸显了行业对AI工具的热情与实际在已发布游戏中的应用之间存在的差距。

fr.title: L'IA était partout à la grande conférence des développeurs de jeux — sauf dans les jeux
fr.summary: Malgré la promotion étendue des outils d'IA à la GDC—y compris les systèmes d'IA générative pour la création de PNJ et le développement de jeux complets—peu de jeux réellement publiés ont montré les capacités de l'IA. Le décalage met en évidence un écart entre l'enthousiasme de l'industrie pour les outils d'IA et l'adoption pratique dans les jeux livrés.

de.title: KI war überall auf der großen Entwicklerkonferenz für Spiele – außer in den Spielen
de.summary: Trotz umfangreicher KI-Tool-Promotion auf der GDC – einschließlich generativer KI-Systeme zur NPC-Erstellung und vollständiger Spielentwicklung – zeigten nur wenige tatsächlich veröffentlichte Spiele KI-Fähigkeiten. Der Unterschied unterstreicht eine Lücke zwischen der Begeisterung der Industrie für KI-Werkzeuge und der praktischen Übernahme in ausgelieferten Spielen.

es.title: La IA estaba en todas partes en la gran conferencia de desarrolladores de juegos — excepto en los juegos
es.summary: A pesar de la extensa promoción de herramientas de IA en la GDC, incluyendo sistemas de IA generativa para la creación de PNJ y desarrollo de juegos completos, pocos juegos realmente lanzados mostraron capacidades de IA. La desconexión destaca una brecha entre el entusiasmo de la industria por las herramientas de IA y la adopción práctica en juegos enviados.

title: Online age checks came first — a VPN crackdown could be next
summary: Following the implementation of online age verification, policymakers are considering VPN restrictions to prevent users from bypassing geo-blocks and accessing censored content. This regulatory escalation reflects broader government efforts to control and monitor online behavior.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more news about online age verification and your privacy, follow Emma Roth. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Virtual private networks, or VPNs, weren't always used to access region-locked Netflix streams, bypass censorship online, or to prevent your internet service provider (ISP) from tracking your browsing history. It took years for VPNs to become the technology we know today, which provides an encrypted connection between your device and a private server, while conce …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在线年龄验证先行——VPN打击可能随后而至
zh.summary: 在实施在线年龄验证之后,政策制定者正在考虑限制VPN以防止用户绕过地理限制和访问被审查的内容。这种监管升级反映了政府更广泛的努力,目的是控制和监视在线行为。

fr.title: Les vérifications d'âge en ligne en premier — une répression contre les VPN pourrait être la prochaine
fr.summary: Suite à la mise en œuvre de la vérification d'âge en ligne, les décideurs politiques envisagent des restrictions VPN pour empêcher les utilisateurs de contourner les géo-blocages et d'accéder à du contenu censuré. Cette escalade réglementaire reflète des efforts gouvernementaux plus larges pour contrôler et surveiller le comportement en ligne.

de.title: Online-Altersüberprüfungen zuerst — eine VPN-Repression könnte als nächstes folgen
de.summary: Nach der Einführung der Online-Altersüberprüfung erwägen Entscheidungsträger VPN-Beschränkungen, um zu verhindern, dass Benutzer Geoblocks umgehen und auf zensierte Inhalte zugreifen. Diese behördliche Eskalation spiegelt breitere Regierungsbestrebungen wider, das Online-Verhalten zu kontrollieren und zu überwachen.

es.title: Las verificaciones de edad en línea primero — una represión de VPN podría ser la siguiente
es.summary: Tras la implementación de la verificación de edad en línea, los legisladores están considerando restricciones de VPN para evitar que los usuarios eludan bloqueos geográficos y accedan a contenido censurado. Esta escalada regulatoria refleja esfuerzos gubernamentales más amplios para controlar y monitorear el comportamiento en línea.

title: Mining the deep ocean
summary: As demand for rare earth minerals and battery materials accelerates, policymakers are debating whether deep ocean mining is necessary and whether environmental safeguards can adequately protect deep-sea ecosystems. The discussion centers on balancing resource needs with ecological preservation.
content: Policymakers debate if we even need deep ocean mining and if we can do it safely.

zh.title: 深海采矿
zh.summary: 随着对稀土矿物和电池材料需求的加速增长，政策制定者正在争论深海采矿是否必要，以及环保措施是否能充分保护深海生态系统。讨论焦点在于平衡资源需求与生态保护。

fr.title: L'exploitation minière des océans profonds
fr.summary: Avec l'accélération de la demande de minéraux de terres rares et de matériaux pour batteries, les décideurs politiques débattent de la nécessité de l'exploitation minière des fonds marins et de la capacité des mesures de protection environnementale à protéger adéquatement les écosystèmes des eaux profondes. La discussion porte sur l'équilibre entre les besoins en ressources et la préservation écologique.

de.title: Tiefseemining
de.summary: Angesichts der beschleunigten Nachfrage nach Seltenerden und Batteriematerialien debattieren Politikgestalter, ob Tiefseemining notwendig ist und ob Umweltschutzmaßnahmen Tiefseee-Ökosysteme angemessen schützen können. Die Diskussion konzentriert sich auf das Gleichgewicht zwischen Ressourcenbedarf und ökologischer Bewahrung.

es.title: Minería en aguas profundas
es.summary: Con la aceleración de la demanda de minerales de tierras raras y materiales para baterías, los responsables políticos debaten si la minería en aguas profundas es necesaria y si las salvaguardas ambientales pueden proteger adecuadamente los ecosistemas de aguas profundas. La discusión se centra en equilibrar las necesidades de recursos con la preservación ecológica.

title: Are AI tokens the new signing bonus or just a cost of doing business?
summary: Tech companies are exploring AI tokens as a potential fourth pillar of engineering compensation beyond salary, equity, and benefits. However, industry observers caution that this trend may simply represent a cost reallocation rather than genuine added value, warranting careful evaluation from engineers. The development highlights broader questions about how technology companies value AI expertise and maintain transparent compensation practices.
content: Maybe tokens really will become the fourth pillar of engineering compensation. But engineers might want to hold the line before embracing this as a straightforward win.

zh.title: AI代币是新的签约奖金，还是只是商业成本？
zh.summary: 科技公司正在探索AI代币作为工程师薪酬的第四支柱，超越工资、股权和福利。然而，业界观察人士警告称，这一趋势可能仅仅代表成本重新分配，而不是真正的增值，需要工程师仔细评估。这一发展突出了科技公司如何评估AI专业知识和维持薪酬透明度等更广泛的问题。

fr.title: Les tokens IA sont-ils les nouveaux bonus à la signature ou simplement un coût habituel ?
fr.summary: Les entreprises technologiques explorent les tokens IA comme un quatrième pilier potentiel de la rémunération des ingénieurs au-delà du salaire, des capitaux propres et des avantages. Cependant, les observateurs de l'industrie avertissent que cette tendance peut simplement représenter une réaffectation des coûts plutôt qu'une valeur ajoutée réelle, justifiant une évaluation attentive des ingénieurs. Cette évolution soulève des questions plus larges sur la façon dont les entreprises technologiques valorisent l'expertise en IA et maintiennent des pratiques de rémunération transparentes.

de.title: Sind KI-Token die neuen Unterzeichnungsboni oder nur Geschäftskosten?
de.summary: Technologieunternehmen erkunden KI-Token als eine mögliche vierte Säule der Ingenieurentschädigung jenseits von Gehalt, Eigenkapital und Leistungen. Branchenbeobachter warnen jedoch, dass dieser Trend möglicherweise nur eine Kostenumverteilung und keine echte Wertschöpfung darstellt, was eine sorgfältige Bewertung durch Ingenieure rechtfertigt. Die Entwicklung wirft breitere Fragen darüber auf, wie Technologieunternehmen KI-Expertise bewerten und transparente Vergütungspraktiken aufrechterhalten.

es.title: ¿Son los tokens de IA el nuevo bono de fichaje o solo un costo comercial?
es.summary: Las empresas tecnológicas están explorando los tokens de IA como un posible cuarto pilar de la compensación de ingeniería más allá del salario, la equidad y los beneficios. Sin embargo, los observadores de la industria advierten que esta tendencia puede simplemente representar una reasignación de costos en lugar de un valor agregado genuino, lo que justifica una evaluación cuidadosa de los ingenieros. El desarrollo destaca preguntas más amplias sobre cómo las empresas tecnológicas valoran la experiencia en IA y mantienen prácticas de compensación transparentes.
